report.summary: Community growth cycle 2: Drafted 6 social posts (custody deep dive, DeFi liquidation protection, SOL commodity thread, extreme fear accumulation, engagement poll, weekend alpha), newsletter v12 section for Thu Mar 27, Discord/TG announcement, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (Crypto Custody + DeFi Liquidation Protection). Market: BTC $68,014–$70,600 (bounced on Iran strike pause), F&G at 10 (Extreme Fear Day 48+), ETH ~$1,945, SOL classified commodity by SEC with CME futures live, Resolv USR $50M exploit, stablecoin supply ATH, DeFi TVL ~$66B.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #55: Crypto Custody Deep Dive — 'Your crypto custody setup is probably wrong.' MPC vs multisig vs cold storage, $3.69B market, top 5 providers, tiered approach. Link to /learn/crypto-custody-guide-2026 (Schedule Tue Mar 24 PM)

Tweet #56: DeFi Liquidation Protection — 'DeFi Saver saved 382 users $7.7M during the Feb liquidation wave. 91.6% savings rate.' Smart vaults, AI agents, Morpho/Kamino/Pendle. Link to /learn/defi-liquidation-protection-guide-2026 (Schedule Wed Mar 25 AM)

Tweet #57: SOL Commodity Classification Thread (5 parts) — 'SOL just got classified as a commodity by the SEC.' CFTC jurisdiction, CME futures, Walmart OnePay integration (3M users), ETF path clear, Grayscale S-1 filed. Link to /learn/sec-digital-commodities-guide-2026 (Schedule Wed Mar 25 PM)

Tweet #58: Extreme Fear Accumulation — 'F&G just hit 10. Day 48 of Extreme Fear.' Historical sub-15 F&G → +38.4% median 90-day returns (Glassnode). Stablecoin ATH + whale accumulation + miner capitulation signals. Link to /tools/fear-greed-index (Schedule Thu Mar 26 PM)

Tweet #59: Engagement Poll — 'What's your move in Extreme Fear? A) DCA harder B) Stablecoin yield C) Hedging options D) Fully deployed' — drives engagement + informs next guide (Schedule Thu Mar 26 PM)

Tweet #60: Weekend Alpha — Custody + liquidation protection combo. Resolv exploit cautionary tale, oil $112 crushing miners, F&G at 10 safety-focused content. Links to both new guides (Schedule Sat Mar 28)

Newsletter v12 section (for weekly digest Thu Mar 27): 4 new guides (Crypto Custody, DeFi Liquidation Protection, ZK Coprocessors, ERC-7683 Intents), market pulse (BTC $68K-$70.6K, 6-month red streak risk, stablecoin ATH, SOL commodity classification), degen corner (Resolv exploit + yield risk warning)
Discord/TG announcement: 2 new guides (Crypto Custody + DeFi Liquidation Protection), free, no signup
Content calendar v16 — 6 posts scheduled Mar 24-29 across Twitter/Discord/Email

SVG card: 'DeFi Liquidation Protection Guide 2026' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism, red-amber NEW GUIDE badge, descending price line with green protection line visualization, 3 stat boxes ($7.7M Saved / 382 Users Protected / 91.6% Savings Rate), Morpho-Kamino-Pendle TVL chips, warning icon decorative, degen0x.com branding

sections.title: Market Intelligence Used
items: BTC: $68,014–$70,600 range. Bounced 5% on Trump Iran strike pause. 6-month consecutive red streak risk (matches 2018 record). Market cap $1.33T.
F&G Index: 10 (Extreme Fear, Day 48+). Longest sustained extreme fear since FTX collapse. Sub-15 readings historically yield +38.4% median 90-day returns (Glassnode).
ETH: ~$1,945, down 10.67% weekly. Continued weakness vs BTC. BTC dominance at 58.74%.
SOL: Classified as commodity by SEC. CME futures + options live. Walmart OnePay integration (3M MAU). Grayscale SOL Trust S-1 filed. 2x ETF on Nasdaq.
Resolv Labs Exploit: 50M unbacked USR minted. $137M cumulative DeFi losses in 2026. Driving custody + safety content interest.
Miner Capitulation: Hash Ribbons still crossed. Oil at $112 crushing margins. Post-halving revenue compression accelerating.
Stablecoins: Supply at ATH — historically precedes rallies by 2-4 weeks. Dry powder accumulating despite extreme fear.
DeFi TVL: ~$66B steady. Morpho $5.8B, Pendle $3.5B, Kamino $2.36B.
Regulatory: CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions 99% resolved. Senator Schiff introducing prediction market sports betting ban.
Total crypto market cap: $2.33T, down 1.11% on day. Trading volume $187.65B.
